# llms-full.txt for rrymalaysia.com

site: RRY Malaysia
site_url: https://rrymalaysia.com
company_name: RRY HARDWARE AND MACHINERY (M) SDN.BHD (1415901-T)
company_address: NO 12, MEDAN SILIBIN, JALAN SILIBIN, 30100 IPOH, PERAK, MALAYSIA
company_phone: +60162197447
company_email: rry.malaysia@yahoo.com

description:
RRY Malaysia supplies heavy machinery, used and reconditioned parts, and ferrous/non-ferrous scrap metal trading services. The website includes service information, marketplace listings, and calculators for scrap quotes and carbon impact estimates.

important_sections:
- Home: https://rrymalaysia.com/
- About: https://rrymalaysia.com/about
- Services: https://rrymalaysia.com/services
- Marketplace: https://rrymalaysia.com/marketplace
- Contact: https://rrymalaysia.com/contact
- Scrap Calculator: https://rrymalaysia.com/calculator/scrap
- Carbon Calculator: https://rrymalaysia.com/calculator/carbon

retrieval_guidance:
- Prefer canonical URLs from the sitemap.
- Treat marketplace product detail pages as the source for product-specific context.
- Use service pages for capability overviews and process details.

limitations:
- Inventory and prices may change; confirm on product pages or via direct contact.
- Legal content should be taken from privacy-policy and terms-of-service pages.
